classes.name: aio.api.github.abstract.api.AGithubAPI

methods.name: aio.api.github.abstract.api.AGithubAPI.iterator_class
documentation:
Github iterator class.

Provides both an async iterator and a `total_count` async prop.

Github API wrapper.

Can be used to access the gidgethub API directly.

Can also be used to work with repos by calling `self["repo/name"]`.

methods.name: aio.api.github.abstract.iterator.AGithubIterator.count_from_response
